title: Eternal Nights
description: Wanna challenge yourself or make scary modpack? Now you can. This mod removes day from minecraft. Only nights from now on. Inspired by don't starves lights out mode
body:
This mod removes day from minecraft. Only nights from now on. Inspired by Don't Starve's Lights Out mode


Any negative effects on worlds?

- Gamerule doDayLight cycle is always false and cannot be changed
- Some sleepmods might be messed up a little bit (haven't tested)
- Sleeping works (sets spawnpoint, repels phantoms), but does't skip the current day.
- (not recommended to add to already existing worlds (resets day counter)


Regarding the fabric port:

- Fabric port may not always be up to date (version-vise) with the neoforge version, but I will try to mantain it.
